title: solanum sodiroi var. dimorphophyllum
intro: Solanum sodiroi var. dimorphophyllum, also known as the Andean nightshade, is a variety of the Solanum sodiroi plant, a flowering plant native to Ecuador. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Solanum sodiroi var. dimorphophyllum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
